creator: freebsd@daemon.de
text:
The port cannot be installed anymore. http://christianserving.org serves a 403 Forbidden and it's also not available on any FreeBSD mirrors anymore:

# make install
===>   ifstated-5.1_2,3 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> ifstated-5.1.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /localdisk/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp2.de.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://ftp2.de.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://christianserving.org/ports/net/ifstated/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://christianserving.org/ports/net/ifstated/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz: Forbidden
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp2.de.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://ftp2.de.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz
fetch: http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ifstated-5.1.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /workdisk/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net/ifstated
